rag_rules: Use initialized state variables to guard comparisons of previous values
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Remove guarantees with unresolved references instead of adding architecture
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool in declarations
generic_rules: Trace unresolved references to the first identifier on the same line
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers in the same annex
Declare initialized state variables for temporal comparisons
Align helper types with expression types to avoid type mismatches
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use eq for initialized temporal recurrence like `eq t : real = 0.1 -> pre(t) + step;`
Use const for constant values like `const recovery_time : real = 1.7;`
Use assign for output assignments like `assign distanceFromFence = circleLinearization(t);`
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean
irrelevant_topics: AGREE assumptions and guarantees that refer to component ports
Subcomponent ports in component type contracts
